text: Fig N. Half roll on the inverted 45 downline. Exit inverted.
Laydown Humpty. Full roll on the downline, half roll on the upline.
Half Reverse Cuban. Push entry, half roll on the 45 downline, outside loop, three-quarter opposite roll on exit.
Spin. One and a half positive turns. Half roll opposite, push to exit inverted.
Hammerhead. Push entry, half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline, half roll to exit.
Q Loop. Half roll on the upline, negative snap at the top, half roll on exit.
Double Humpty. Quarter roll on the upline, positive snap on the downline, quarter roll on top. Exit inverted.
Reverse Laydown Humpty. One and a half rolls on the upline, half roll on the downline. Exit inverted.
Half Cuban. Outside loop, half roll on the downline.
